title: Beulah Land
description: Beulah Land is a Christian community that enjoys modded Minecraft. It is also the name of our vanilla++ modpack.
body:
Beulah Land is a modpack meant to retain the vanilla vibe of Minecraft. Our vanilla++ modpack is meant to emphasize the adventure, combat, and base-building mechanics of the game. Some of our core mods include **Roguelike Dungeons**, **Battle Towers**, **Origins**, and **Serilum's tweaks and additions**.

Spawn in a **village with a name**, amidst villagers **that are named**, which enjoy new and exciting mechanics: villagers may now heal their golems and one another, villagers never run out of trades, and _villages are now safe from mob spawning_.

Equipped with a **Starter Kit** and prompted to choose a unique **Origin** with various perks (and debuffs!), you may choose to dive into a **Roguelike Dungeon** filled to the brim with unique challenges and loot, ascend a **Battle Tower** to test your mettle against the Boss at the top, or explore the new and exciting world.

And whatever you do, it is done in style with the beautiful and vanilla+ **Reimagined Shaders**, which are coupled with new animations and performance enhancing mods for balance. Mobs move with bravato and swing, players jump and sprint with urgency, and trees sway in the wind.

Whichever beautiful and dangerous fate you choose, whether you descend or ascend, resist the darkness or join her, it is yours to choose. You make the game, not the other way around.
